diagnosis_rationale: Correctly identifies FX graph caching mechanism, points to real caching tutorial and TORCHINDUCTOR_FX_GRAPH_CACHE env var. Correct root cause. (Fabrication corrected: save_cache_artifacts/load_cache_artifacts ARE real APIs per torch.compiler.__init__.py.)
Correctly diagnoses concurrent writes to cache files as root cause of JSONDecodeError. Accurately identifies multi-process cache safety as undocumented.
Accurately identifies doc gap: profiling tools are documented but compilation granularity trade-offs (why fullgraph can be slower) are not. Correct gap identification under Track 2 constraints.
Accurately identifies that torch.optim docs cover APIs but not optimizer compilation support/issues. Correctly diagnoses the 'too many arguments' as signature mismatch. Accurate gap identification.

Partially inaccurate: claims 'No official documentation addresses TORCHINDUCTOR_FX_GRAPH_CACHE usage' — but the caching tutorial DOES document it. Correctly identifies advanced cold start gaps (AOTAutograd caching, additional cache layers) but misses existing basic coverage.
Accurately identifies that compile timeout + NCCL timeout interaction is not addressed in docs. Correctly distinguishes what docs cover (basic compile, general troubleshooting) vs the specific gap.
Accurately identifies that loop compilation overhead / dynamo loop handling is not addressed in docs. Correct gap identification.
Accurately identifies that pick_vec_isa behavior and CPU ISA detection overhead are not documented. Correct gap identification for an internal implementation detail.
Accurately identifies that version-specific regression analysis (2.10 FSDP + dynamic shapes) is not documented. Correct gap identification.
Accurately distinguishes Dynamo frontend caching from Inductor backend caching. Correctly identifies Dynamo-level persistent caching as unavailable/undocumented. Strong diagnosis.
Accurately identifies that AOT Autograd tracing time diagnosis is not addressed in docs. Correct gap identification.
Accurately identifies that FSDP mixed precision + compile combination is not addressed in docs. Correct gap identification.
Accurately identifies that custom op memory access errors under compile are not addressed in docs. Correctly notes torch.library docs exist but don't cover this failure mode.
Accurately identifies that FlexAttention memory access errors are not addressed in docs. Correctly notes FlexAttention blogs focus on usage, not debugging.
Accurately identifies that CUDA graphs + multithreaded inference is not addressed in docs. Correct gap identification.
Accurately identifies that symmetric memory + compile interaction is not documented. Correct gap identification for an advanced/experimental feature.
Accurately identifies that @custom_op vs Library.define performance comparison is not documented. Correct gap identification.
Accurately identifies that custom reduction op CPU inductor performance is not documented. Correct gap identification.
Accurately identifies that Triton pin compatibility issues with FlexAttention are not documented. Correct gap identification.
Accurately identifies that FlexAttention backward gradient correctness issues are not documented. Correct gap identification.
